g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the landing page show?')
sendPrompt('How does auth state detection work?')
sendPrompt('What does the login page look like?')
sendPrompt('Where is the JWT stored on the client?')
sendPrompt('What does the personalised feed show?')
sendPrompt('How does post creation work with image upload?')
sendPrompt('What can a user do on a single post page?')
sendPrompt('What is shown on a user profile page?')
sendPrompt('What happens after a post is saved?')
sendPrompt('How does the like toggle work?')
sendPrompt('How are comments stored and displayed?')
sendPrompt('How does the follow system affect the feed?')
sendPrompt('What restrictions apply to editing or deleting posts?')
sendPrompt('What fields can a user update on their profile?')
